t_ch: 我的论文又被打回来了……
t_en: My thesis was rejected again...
What version are you up to now?
I can't even remember...

t_ch: 这新品也没那么好吃啊……
t_en: This new one isn't very yum...

t_ch: 美食专栏作者出来挨打。
t_en: Who authored this food column? Come out, and get a beating.
The Winterlands re-creator...
Is that her? No way.
I knew she looked familiar!

t_ch: 跟你们说个劲爆的消息，你们可千万别传出去。
t_en: Let me tell you some awesome news — but you have to promise not to tell anyone.
Why so mysterious?

t_ch: 哎，就那个《雪国冒险奇谭》二次创作知名作者嘛……
t_en: Hey, it's the well-known re-creator of that Tale of the Winterlands...

t_ch: 我上次去交流会的时候看到她摘面具了——就是那个铁卫，千真万确！
t_en: I saw her take off her mask at the last meet-and-greet — it's that Silvermane Guard for sure!

t_ch: 真的？！我老早就觉得她眼熟了…啊不是，耳熟！
t_en: Really!? I knew she looked familiar... I mean, sounded familiar!

t_ch: 真是她？不会吧，铁卫还让干这个？
t_en: Really? No way. Is that what a Silvermane Guard is supposed to do?

t_ch: 哎哟，这有啥啊！铁卫写个小说画个画怎么了？
t_en: Heck. It's just a storm in a teacup! What's wrong with Silvermane Guards writing fiction and making illustrations?

t_ch: 就是就是，那个朗道家的大小姐还玩音乐呢！
t_en: That's right. The eldest daughter at the Landaus still plays her music!
Did you bring any cash?

t_ch: 时候不早了，咱们结账吧。
t_en: It's late. Time to get the bill.
Are we splitting it equally?

t_ch: 行啊。你们等会儿，我找找钱包……
t_en: Okay. Hang on, let me grab my wallet...
...Drat.
...You too, huh?

t_ch: 嗐，算了算了，这次我请吧……
t_en: Ah, forget about it. This time, it's my treat...
...Do you guys mind washing dishes?
Daddy...
Sir!

t_ch: 岳父大人！就请您放心地把女儿交给我吧！
t_en: Sir! Please trust me with your daughter!

t_ch: 爸爸，我和他是真心相爱的……
t_en: Daddy, I really love him...

t_ch: 是贝洛伯格学院毕业的吗？
t_en: Are you a graduate of Belobog Academy?
Uhh...

t_ch: 在克里珀堡工作吗？工资多少？
t_en: Do you work at Qlipoth Fort? How much do you earn?
Mm? *sigh*
Do you have your own car?
I s—still don't have my license, sir...
Have you got a house in the Administrative District?
Uh...

t_ch: 好了，不逗你们玩了。我同意这门婚事。
t_en: Alright, I'll let up on the teasing then. I assent to this marriage.
...Thank you so much, sir!
Lord Qlipoth...
Lord Qlipoth...

t_ch: 如果您能听到我的呼唤……
t_en: If you can hear me calling...

t_ch: 请把我的晚餐从红肠换成别的东西吧…什么都可以……
t_en: Please change my dinner from sausages to something else... Anything at all...

t_ch: 请保佑我的私房钱别被人发现…尤其是那位……
t_en: Please let no one find my secret bank account... Especially my wife...

t_ch: 请让我再见女儿一面吧…我太想她了……
t_en: Please let me see my daughter again... I miss her so much...

t_ch: 请将您的「存护」之力赐予我那不成器的儿子…使他免遭伤害……
t_en: Please bestow your powers of Preservation upon that useless son of mine... And deliver him from suffering...
Check out this ad...
Wow. Audacious.
Our destination is...
Sounds lovely...
Wow...

t_ch: 我是把行李放这儿了啊……
t_en: I did put my luggage here...

t_ch: 本次旅行的目的地是磐岩镇，首先我们要去歌德大饭店办理入住……
t_en: Today's destination is Boulder Town. First up, let's check in to our lodgings at the Goethe Grand Hotel...

t_ch: 下层区也有歌德家的产业吗？听起来不错啊……
t_en: Are there Goethe properties in the Underworld, too? Sounds awesome...
Wow...

t_ch: 哎，我是把行李放这儿了啊…上哪儿去了？
t_en: Hey, I left my luggage here... Where is it?
Gotta tidy things up again...
Where did all this trash come from?
Why's nobody here yet?
Have they slept in?
Have they stood me up?

t_ch: 不会是我记错时间了吧？
t_en: Did I get the time wrong?
When does the cable car get to the station...
What time does the cable car depart?
I don't remember...
How long have we been sitting here?
Have we bought our tickets?
That car just now... could it be...
...Drat.
This timetable...

t_ch: 怎么找不到咱们那趟啊？
t_en: Where's our cable car? I can't find it on here.
Is this from last year?
Has somebody borrowed it?
Could it be on the bookshelf...
Where is it...
The industrial zone rep wrote a letter to say...
You should respond to him like this...
The Silvermane Guards are going to apply for more funding again...
That's just the way it is...
Public reps have filed a petition...
Let me think about it...
There weren't this many yesterday, right?
When will it ever end...

t_ch: 写错的那张就在这里面？
t_en: That incorrect one... Is it in here?
Probably...

t_ch: 这就是今天要搞定的量？
t_en: Is this the lot for today?
Mm? *sigh*
Please keep quiet.
Do you need a hand?
Welcome to Qlipoth Fort.

t_ch: 还是这避难所呆着舒服。
t_en: This shelter really is the most comfortable.
Just another day of nothing to do...

t_ch: 这小子不会还在睡觉吧……
t_en: Don't tell me that punk is still asleep...
How many days has he been sleeping?

t_ch: 前方的矿道已经封闭了。
t_en: The mine passages ahead have been closed off.
It's dangerous up ahead. Keep clear.

t_ch: 是不是该去找个工作了……
t_en: Might be time for me to find a new job...
I'm not sure if the mining team is still hiring...
How did you break it?
I... I dunno...

t_ch: 这是我们唯一一盏灯了……
t_en: That's the only lamp we have...
S—sorry...
How am I going to drag it back...
Who did this to the mine cart...
Where is my leftover rat jelly...

t_ch: 我吃剩的油炸岩居蟹呢……
t_en: Where is my leftover deep-fried rock crab...
Where is my leftover stone-grilled olm...
It's time for us to stand strong!
All in the name of defense!
Yeah. Yeah!

t_ch: 没想到克拉拉小姐又为我们送来了物资……
t_en: I didn't expect Miss Clara to send us more supplies...

t_ch: 克拉拉小姐…对我们真是太好了！
t_en: Miss Clara... She's really spoiled us!
Yeah. Yeah!

t_ch: 我们是时候站出来，回报克拉拉小姐了！
t_en: It's time for us to stand up and repay Miss Clara!
You're right!
Yeah. Yeah!

t_ch: 所以…海报贴出去之后，有人加入我们的协会吗？
t_en: So... After our poster campaign, did we get any new members?

t_ch: 暂时还没有…但我相信大家一定会响应我们的号召！
t_en: Not yet... But I'm sure everyone will answer our call!
Yeah. Yeah!
...Is that the only thing you know how to say?
Yeah. Yeah!

t_ch: 我去过能源转换设施了……
t_en: I've been to the energy conversion station before...
Sounds really mysterious.
If we can get into the Furnace Core...
There's no way.

t_ch: 史瓦罗大佬究竟是什么来头……
t_en: What's Boss Svarog's background?
Best not to ask.
I heard about the latest rap battle...
No way?
That's all just a rumor...

t_ch: 哎，你们听说了吗？无敌大老爹宣布参加这次说唱比赛了！
t_en: Hey, did you hear? Big Daddy Invincible is entering the next rap battle!

t_ch: 不可能吧？我听说他早就交代在裂界里了。
t_en: No way? I thought he met his maker in the Fragmentum.

t_ch: 那都是传言…我还听说他找着门路去上层区享受了呢。
t_en: That's just a rumor... I heard that he hustled his way up to the Overworld and is living his best life.

t_ch: 我好像也听过这个说法。他们说有个蓝色头发的手眼通天……
t_en: I heard the same thing, too. They say there's this blue-haired guy who can do anything...

t_ch: 蓝色头发？不会是那个人吧……
t_en: Blue hair? There's no way it could actually be...
Do we have the right amount of supplies?
They're all good. I counted them.
Do we have any medicines left this month?
Still got a few vials left, but not a lot...

t_ch: 克拉拉小姐又送来了物资。
t_en: Miss Clara had sent over some more supplies.
We're so lucky to have her...
When was the last time you came home!?
I've got my own dilemma too...
When was the last time you came home!?
Isn't this... competing night and day, around the clock...

t_ch: 别说得和你要打拳似的！
t_en: Don't talk so tough like it's a fight!
Is it possible...
Impossible! Come back home with me right now!
I'd like to transfer one ticket for tonight...
Alright, mom. Let's go.
Don't worry. Let me reminisce about it for a while...

t_ch: 妈妈我啊，当年可强得很……
t_en: Back then, your mother was very strong, you know...
Could you really be the one back then who...?

t_ch: 优质纯净水，第二杯半价！
t_en: Quality purified water. Second glass half-price!

t_ch: 听说了吗？矿队正在招人……
t_en: Have you heard? The mining team is hiring...
Wanna go and take a look?
*snore*

t_ch: 清蒸水晶蝎子…再来一碟……
t_en: Steamed crystal scorpion... I'll have another serving, thanks...
Is that even edible?
*snore*
Rat jelly... I'll have another serving, thanks...
Is that even edible?
*snore*
Deep-fried funeral worm... I'll have another serving, thanks...
Is that even edible?
The building blocks for the Miner's Lamp look pretty interesting...
I heard that thing's somehow cursed...

t_ch: 听说了吗？歌蒂从巴列维那儿搞到块积木，来头似乎不小哩。
t_en: Have you heard? Gertie got a building block from Balaway. Seems like she's well-connected.

t_ch: 你是说被她当作压泡菜坛子石头的那个？角上尖尖的？
t_en: You mean the one she used as a block to press out kimchi? With pointed corners?

t_ch: 对对对，就是那玩意！那家伙不识货，要是我们能给搞过来……
t_en: Yup, that's the one! She doesn't know the value of what she's got. If we could get it...

t_ch: 不太好吧，我听说那积木里寄宿着旧世界皇室的怨灵……
t_en: Nah, I heard that the old world royals live inside and haunt that building block...

t_ch: 奶奶，我们什么时候回家？
t_en: Grandma, when can we go home?

t_ch: 再等等…奶奶的腰僵住了……
t_en: Hold on a moment... I got a stiff back...
Let's join the Moles' big adventure!
Follow Hook for some yummy meats!
Work time's over... Where should I go, then?
I heard that catching Olms is lucrative work...

t_ch: 放工了…咱要不上哪儿逛逛？
t_en: Work time's over... Let's hang out. What do you say?

t_ch: 我听说捉洞螈挺有赚头，等会儿准备去看看。
t_en: I heard that catching Olms is lucrative work, so I'm gonna go check things out later.

t_ch: 哎哟，我服了…你都干了一天了，能不能别干了啊？
t_en: Goodness gracious, I give up... you've been at it for a whole day. Ready to give up?

t_ch: 那哪儿成啊，还得攒钱买「冷面小青龙」签名限量安全帽呢。
t_en: How can I settle for that? I have to save up for my limited-edition safety helmet signed by Cold Dragon Young.
I've got a headache... Could it be the Geomarrow radiation?
You're tired. Go and get some rest.
Olm Egg Pudding! So fragrant!
Haha, don't worry.
Ack, blackmailed by vagrants again...
Go and talk to Wildfire.
Are these ingredients safe...
Mom, what's "milk"?

t_ch: 您放心，我们有专门渠道。
t_en: Rest assured that we have dedicated supply channels.
Could it have been that blue-haired guy...

t_ch: 这地下还能搞到「哞哞」牛奶？你们这火淇淋不会不干净吧？
t_en: Can you get Moo-Moo Milk from the underground? Are there any problems with your Fire Chillin' Ice Cream here?
Mom, what's "milk"?

t_ch: 哎，瞧您这话说的——我这小摊有专门的供货渠道，您尽管放心！
t_en: Hey, watch what you say — our stall has dedicated supply channels. Rest assured!

t_ch: 那个蓝头发的，居然还做这种生意吗……
t_en: Can't believe that blue-haired guy is doing this line of work...
Air-dried Olm meat slice!
Meaty fresh — not salty nor fishy!

t_ch: 回收旧十字镐，坏鹤嘴锄！
t_en: Recycle old pickaxes and broken ones!
Recycle old shovels and broken piledrivers!
Curated dried earthworm chips!
Use your leisure time to keep yourself company!
The Overworld first choice: Moo-Moo Milk!

t_ch: 无糖脱脂，呵护你的健康！
t_en: Sugar-free skim milk: Take care of your health!
Exterior glacial cod liver oil!
Protect your vision without hormones!
Qlipoth Fort's special dill stash!
Fresh seafood with great seasoning!
This poem is beautifully crafted.

t_ch: 「琥珀 琥珀 再一块琥珀滋润」
t_en: "Amber, Amber, more Amber for thy soul"
"O, wandering stars of my hometown so aimless"

t_ch: 啧啧，这诗写得真有文采……
t_en: Tsk-tsk, this poem is beautifully crafted...
A pity I can't understand it.
I'm here with the latest in today's news...

No heckling!
Hmph, I knew it...
Oh, it's all over...

t_en: Ahem, I'm here with the latest in today's news...

t_ch: 近日，磐岩镇多位矿民遭到无赖流浪者敲诈勒索……
t_en: Recently, a number of miners in Boulder Town have been enduring blackmails by vagrants...

t_ch: 请广大镇民提高警惕，如遇案情迅速报告「地火」！
t_en: Please be vigilant out there, and notify the Wildfire instantly if you run into an encounter with them!

t_ch: 哼，我就知道，这群流浪者没一个好鸟……
t_en: Hmm, I knew it. These vagrants are without fail a bunch of bad eggs...

t_ch: 哎，人心不古！我看这贝洛伯格是要完啊……
t_en: Hey, the decline of public morality! It's the end of the road for Belobog...

I'm here with the latest in today's news...

No heckling!

t_en: Ahem, I'm here with the latest in today's news...

t_en: A fierce conflict recently broke out between some miners and vagrants at the Great Mine. Svarog's robots forcibly intervened...

t_ch: 在不知名外来者三人组协助下，「地火」成功稳定形势，化解了下层区的重大危机！
t_en: With the help of a trio of outsiders, Wildfire successfully stabilized the situation and rescued the Underworld from great trouble!

t_ch: 哼，我就知道，这地下没了「地火」就不行……
t_en: Hah, I knew that the underground wouldn't survive without Wildfire...

t_ch: 哎，世态炎凉！我看这贝洛伯格是要完啊……
t_en: Ah, the vicissitudes of life! It's the end of the road for Belobog...

No heckling!

t_en: Ahem, I'm here with the latest in today's news...

t_ch: 歌德大饭店隆重上新，另急招新菜品测试员！
t_en: The Goethe Grand Hotel is finally reopening, and they're looking to recruit some new taste-testers!

t_ch: 哼，我就知道，只靠着那老三样，歌德饭店指定走不远……
t_en: Hmph, I knew that only relying on the same old recipes would never take the Goethe Grand Hotel very far...

t_ch: 哎，异想天开！我看这贝洛伯格是要完啊……
t_en: Ah, the absurdity! It's the end of the road for Belobog...

t_ch: 咳咳，我来播报今天的新闻……
t_en: Ahem, I'm here with the latest in today's news...

t_ch: 洞螈供需市场近期低位震荡，入场有风险，兼职需谨慎！
t_en: The Olm markets have been tanking recently. Investing now is risky, and hobbyists should be careful!

t_ch: 哼，我就知道，想靠抓洞螈来钱根本不现实……
t_en: Hmph, I knew catching Olms was never going to be a realistic way of making money...

t_ch: 哎，惟利是趋！我看这贝洛伯格是要完啊……
t_en: Ah, the cupidity! It's the end of the road for Belobog...
Another, another!
Quit heckling, brat!
Where's that cheeky kid gone off to now?
H—Hook, she...
Don't just sell her out like that...

t_ch: 对不起小朋友，已经卖完了……
t_en: Sorry, kid — they're all sold out.
Boohoo... But that's the one I wanted!
Oh, I really am sorry...
Move aside and quit causing trouble.
This old geezer...
Three hundred shield.
Fifty.
Two hundred and eighty.
Fifty.
Two hundred and seventy, and nothing less.
Fifty.

t_ch: 哎，这老头…哪有像你这么砍价的！
t_en: Gah, this old geezer... Who would haggle like you!
...Two hundred and fifty. Are you gonna take it?
Deal.
Why hasn't he come and apologized...?

t_ch: 爸爸，你快去找妈妈道歉吧。
t_en: Daddy, apologize to mommy.
Uh, let me stew in it just a little bit longer...

t_ch: 这个月生活费又不够了……
t_en: My monthly allowance's nearly run out again...

t_ch: 没办法，咱再找点活干吧。
t_en: Uh oh, we'll have to find some more work for us to do, then.
Twenty-eight, twenty-nine...
...Why did you start jumping back?

t_ch: 咱都站这儿数了一天了，要不回去吧。
t_en: We've been standing here all day counting. May as well go back.
Twenty-eight, twenty-nine...

t_ch: 不是，我说…咱整天在这儿数有多少人经过，有意思吗？
t_en: No, I mean... Does it make any sense by standing around all day and counting people passing by?
Thirty-two, thirty-three...
Hey, are you listening to me?
Twenty-eight, twenty-nine...
...Why did you start jumping back?
Are you sure this is the way?
Don't worry. Let me think it over...
Uh... Huh...
What a brute...
Stay cool...
Oh, that's tough...
Ha, I found your weakness...
Hooboy... That's tough.
Ha... Sixty-seven, sixty-eight...
Jab! Haymaker! And one more...
Jab! Jab! Uppercut!
Wonderful!
Yes, that's it!
What a punch!
Told you he's no good.
...Enough of that. He'll surely turn the tide!
Oh, that was wrong!
Beautiful! Give him another two!
That's it? Even I can do that!
...It's only just begun.
I'm telling you, he's no good this season...
Tsk, whatever!
I'm pretty fond of that one there...

t_ch: 你看了他上一把比赛了吗？我就说他这赛季不行……
t_en: Did you see his last match? I'm telling you, he's no good this season...

t_ch: 你少来吧，懂不懂上届冠军的含金量啊？
t_en: That's enough. Do you understand how much the last championship is worth?

t_ch: 其实我还是比较看好那个机械臂小子……
t_en: I'm actually feeling pretty good about that guy with the robot arm...

t_ch: 就他？我上届冠军必秒那个机械臂。
t_en: That robot-armed guy? He is apparently no match for the champion of last season.
Ha, she went bananas!

t_ch: 哔——啵，发现克拉拉的朋友。开启礼仪模式。
t_en: Beep-boop. Clara's friend found. Polite mode, on.

t_ch: 你好，{NICKNAME}。欢迎来到友好的机械聚落。在聚落内，无论对人或机器都请保持文明友善的态度，拒绝打架斗殴等行为。
t_en: Hello, {NICKNAME}. Welcome to the friendly Robot Settlement. All humans and machines must remain civil and friendly in the settlement. Fighting is strictly prohibited.

t_ch: 哔——啵。祝你玩得开心，克拉拉的朋友。
t_en: Beep-boop. I hope you have a good time, Clara's friend.
Mm-hmmm~ Lalala~
Come down if you've had enough...
I wanna go up there too...
Big gray bear~ So impressive~
When are you gonna come down...
I wanna go up there too...
Mmm... Gray, sit!
S—Sit? ...Sit?
Why isn't it listening to me...
Gray... Do a roll!
R—Roll? Rolling rolling...
Hmm, how should I train it...
Give it up! You can't defeat me!
Hmph, don't make me do a mutual destruction!
Beat it up! Show no mercy!
Go, big bro!
What move should I make next...
You can surrender any time!
Don't hesitate! Keep attacking!
Hang on, big bro!
What should I do...
Should I ask Boss Svarog for help...
What a headache...
Should I discuss with Clara first...
Big sis Clara...
I wanna play with her...
Big sis Clara...
When would she have time...
Careful. It's dangerous up ahead.
There are monsters outside. Be careful.
An edge to the Fragmentum lies up ahead.
It's dangerous ahead. No entry.
Please report to the leader.
I'm on duty. No time to chat.
I'm kinda sleepy...
When on earth is the next shift starting...
Listen up and pay attention!
Yes, sir!
Have you heard?
No way...
The Mechanical Fever is planning a comeback.
Welcome to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.
Military zone: No entry.
Please visit any time.
Don't interfere with official Silvermane duty.

t_ch: 欢迎来到旧武器试验场。
t_en: Welcome to the Old Weapon Testing Ground.
Ack... how did I lose again...?

t_ch: 哼哼，我的「圆滚滚」是无敌的！
t_en: Ha, my "Chubbie" is invincible!
Oh, no! My "Chubbie"...
What's this Aether Spirit?

t_ch: 这是我们罗浮的「灯昼龙鱼」…
t_en: It's Illumination Dragonfish from the Luofu...
I wanna go outside, too...
I wanna go to the Luofu and see the "lantern fish"...
I'll go with you!
I hope Daddy will win...

t_ch: 放心吧，他可是镇上最厉害的。
t_en: Don't worry. He's the best player in our town.
Daddy lost...
Well, there are so many great players out there.
Daddy will get it back next time.
Why did Daddy lose?
Daddy has his limits...
You know what? It doesn't really matter if you win or lose...
What matters is enjoying the game with the ones you love.
Hey, have you heard the news?
Yeah, that Trotter...
I'll challenge you, Gramps!
I'm just here to get some food...
Could you just give me a break, kid...?
But I haven't won a single time yet...
You will win, sooner or later.

t_ch: 这和机械宠物有区别吗？
t_en: What's the difference between this and a mech-pet?
You won't understand...
Luka is the best player ever!
But he doesn't even have a Trotter...

t_ch: 还是开拓者{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}比较厉害！
t_en: I think {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} Trailblazer is a better player!
If we had bought tickets...
Come on, we can just watch it from here.
As I thought, compared to his companionship...
The game, Aetherium Wars itself, is what I care more about.
Please follow the rules.
I also want to participate...
Break a leg.
The structure of the giant robot...
...It's nothing like that of an automaton.
This project holds great significance...
...We've got to stay vigilant all the time.
Yes, sir.
Please maintain a safe distance from the cargo.
We should focus on the long run.

t_ch: 我还是觉得我的方案更好…
t_en: I still think my plan is better...
First, all plans must take practicality into consideration.
This is a huge project.

t_ch: 最近的外来者越来越多了。
t_en: There are more outsiders day by day.
...Should we call them "aliens"?
Hey, how's it going?
I'm fine, how about you?
Eh.
Personally, I think the sour soup tastes the best.
Hmmm, I prefer the sweet soup.
Such a massive project...
I wonder when we'll be able to finish it.
Every pickaxe swing...
...Will bring us closer to a brighter future.
O, Jarilo, mighty and grand~
Our cherished homeland, we stand~
Through seven hundred winters' cold~
Love's flowers bloom, brave and bold~
Raise your hats and glasses high~
Bonfires ablaze, lighting the sky~
By scarlet stars' glow, we see~
Our journey through time, wild and free~

t_ch: 总有一天，我也要开大机器人。
t_en: One day, I'll pilot a giant robot.

t_ch: 总有一天，我也要造大机器人。
t_en: One day, I'll build a giant robot.

t_ch: 总有一天，我也要当大机器人。
t_en: One day, I'll become a giant robot.
I remember hiding it right here...

t_ch: 那可是好东西，不能丢啊。
t_en: I just can't afford to lose my treasure.
Manual labor is just not my thing.
It's exhausting and does nothing to elevate my status...

t_ch: 我应该做工程指挥才对。
t_en: I should work as an engineering director.
Repurpose those transistors...
And recycle those worn devices...
We need more raw materials for that.
Why is it not responding?
Could it be a wrong wiring connection?
Then why don't you reconnect the wires?
Because the tools aren't ready yet.
And there's no one at the workbench.

t_ch: 姐姐姐姐，这是什么以太灵呀？
t_en: Sister, sister, what is that Aether Spirit?

t_ch: 这是我们罗浮的「灯昼龙鱼」。
t_en: It's Illumination Dragonfish from the Luofu.
Oh, I get it!

t_ch: 那「灯昼龙鱼」又是什么呢？
t_en: So, what is an Illumination Dragonfish?

t_ch: 这个呀，就是一条长得像灯笼的鱼形机巧……
t_en: Well, it's a fish-shaped ingenium that looks like a lantern...

t_ch: …还是长得像鱼的灯笼形机巧？
t_en: ...Or is it a lantern-shaped ingenium that looks like a fish?

t_ch: 我早就和你说了，要早点买票……
t_en: I told you before to buy the tickets early...

t_ch: 你说要是我们买了票，还至于在这儿杵着吗？
t_en: If we'd bought tickets, do you think we'd still be stuck here?

t_ch: 哎呀，你看…咱在这儿不也照样看比赛嘛？
t_en: Ah, look... We can still watch the competition from here, can't we?

t_ch: 我看你个头！你自己看看，这地方能看清楚吗？
t_en: "We can watch it from here"... Grow a pair of eyes and look around! You think we can see anything from here?
Ah...

t_ch: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。找我这个老头子有什么事吗？
t_en: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum, {F#young miss}{M#young man}. Is there anything an old man like me can help you with?
I'm just here to visit the museum.

t_ch: 呵呵，那你走错了。这里是博物馆的仓库，出门向右，经过前台便是展厅。
t_en: Oh hoho, you're at the wrong place. This is the museum's warehouse. Head out then turn right, the exhibition hall is past the reception counter.
I'm here solely to talk with older people.

t_ch: 呵呵，那可真是个特别的爱好。不过，这里毕竟是博物馆——难得来一趟，你不妨去参观看看。从这里出门向右，经过前台便是展厅了。
t_en: Hah, what a unique hobby. However, this is a museum after all. Since you're here, might as well have a tour. Head out then turn right, the exhibition hall is past the reception counter.

t_ch: 如果你在游览途中遇到了什么问题，或者对我们的展览有什么意见或建议，都可以来找我聊聊——
t_en: If you have any questions along your tour, or if you have any feedback or opinions, welcome to come talk to me...

t_ch: ——我是贝洛伯格艺术学院前任校长，现在的博物馆馆长于尔丹。请多指教了。
t_en: ...I am Uldan, former dean of the Belobog College of Art, and now the curator of this museum. Pleased to meet you.

t_ch: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。找我这位馆长有什么事吗？
t_en: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. Is there anything an old curator like me can help you with?
I would like to chat with you...

t_ch: 你说说看，我可以尽量为你解答。
t_en: Let's talk, I will do my best to answer your questions.
What does the museum do?

t_ch: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆——顾名思义，就是向公众展示贝洛伯格历史文化的展览馆。
t_en: Belobog History and Culture Museum... As the name might suggest, it is a display gallery to showcase Belobog's history and culture to the public.

t_ch: 大守护者可可利亚牺牲后，她的女儿布洛妮娅决定向公众展示冬城七百年来的全部真相，于是这博物馆便成了窗口。
t_en: After the Supreme Guardian Cocolia's sacrifice, her daughter, Bronya had decided to open seven hundred years' worth of the Everwinter City's history to the masses, so this museum has become a window to our past.

t_ch: 虽然贝洛伯格历史只有七百年左右，谈不上悠久；况且许多文物已经被风雪彻底掩埋，这博物馆实在没有多少可以展出的内容……
t_en: Though, Belobog's history is only seven hundred years old, it's not really that long. Furthermore, many historical relics have already been buried under the snow, so the museum doesn't really have that many things to put up...

t_ch: …但我们还是绞尽脑汁，试图用所剩无几的史料和艺术品把整个贝洛伯格历史串联起来。就目前的状况而言…我们的目标大约算是达成了吧。
t_en: ...But we still squeezed all we can in an attempt to string our story together with the little historical sources and art pieces we have. As for our current situation... I guess our goal is somewhat fulfilled.
Belobog College of Art?

t_ch: 这是贝洛伯格大学下设的学院之一，专门向大学生们提供艺术教育，并为我们这座城市培养更多的艺术人才。
t_en: It is one of the colleges under the University of Belobog. It specializes in providing art education to its students, so that we can nurture more artistic talents for our city.

t_ch: 这座学校是我的母校，也是我宝贵的心血。倒也不是自夸，但在我任校长那会儿，我们学院的办学水平可以说是达到了有史以来的新高峰……
t_en: The college is my alma mater, and I poured my heart and soul in it. I don't mean to indulge in self-praise, but when I was serving as its dean, the college's education level was at its historic peak...

t_ch: …咳，好汉不提当年勇，过去的事情就不谈了。眼下最要紧的还是我们贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆啊。
t_en: ...Ahem, A good man does not brag about the past, let us move on from this. The more important thing right now is our Belobog History and Culture Museum.
I want to understand your past...

t_ch: 呵呵，没想到你对老头子我的过去感兴趣啊。我只是个普通人罢了，不过既然你问到，那我就简单展开说说吧。
t_en: Hehe, you're interested in an old man's past? I'm just an ordinary person, but since you asked, I'll tell you a little bit about myself.

t_ch: 我是贝洛伯格艺术学院的毕业生，那时的我是初生牛犊不怕虎，天真地以为自己和艺术都有改变世界的力量……
t_en: I was a graduate of the Belobog College of Art. Back then, I had no fear and naively believed that me and my art has the power to change the world...

t_ch: 结果，正如你所能想到的——我四处屡屡碰壁，活成了小说里艺术家该有的样子…怀才不遇、穷困潦倒，连自己的温饱都解决不了，更别提梦想了。
t_en: Well, you can guess the rest... Everywhere I go, I faced rejection. I became the stereotypical image of an artist... No opportunities, poor, starving, all of those. I could barely handle basic necessities like food and shelter, let alone my dreams.

t_ch: 巧的是，正在我准备放下画笔，彻底和艺术告别的时候，我的母校向我抛来了橄榄枝——他们想要我回去做教授，我也就顺水推舟地同意了。
t_en: The funny thing is, when I was ready to set down my paint brush and stop doing art for good, but then my alma mater handed me a deal — they wanted me to go back and become a professor, and so I agreed.

t_ch: 于是，我就这么做下去，一直做到了校长的位置上，也带出来不少得意门生——他们中的许多人，在如今的冬城也算是赫赫有名的艺术大师了。
t_en: I gave it all I had, and eventually, I climbed my way up to become the dean of the college. I'm proud of all my students — many of which are famous artists in the Everwinter City.

t_ch: 在后来，我的人生便没什么起伏了。我一直做到了退休，后来又接到大守护者布洛妮娅的邀请，才来了如今的博物馆担任馆长。
t_en: My life has been pretty smooth sailing ever since. After my retirement, I accepted Supreme Guardian Bronya's invitation and became the curator of this museum.

t_ch: 接下来嘛…就走一步看一步吧。
t_en: What happens next? Well, we'll see.

t_ch: 我没问题了，就到这里吧。
t_en: I have no further questions.

t_ch: 呵呵，慢走。祝你享受这趟历史文化之旅。
t_en: Heheh, take care now. I hope you enjoy this historical cultural tour.
I'll go ahead and tour now.

t_ch: 呵呵，慢走。祝你享受这趟历史文化之旅。
t_en: Hehe, take care now. I hope you enjoy this historical cultural tour.

t_ch: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。佩拉小姐已经和我说过了，您可以免票参观！
t_en: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. Miss Pela has notified me that you can enter free of charge!

t_ch: 请问，您现在要进入博物馆吗？
t_en: Would you like to enter the museum?
Please take me in.
Alright, please follow me!
